title: Phunware Reports Third Quarter 2024 Financial Results
text: Phunware reported significant improvements in its third quarter 2024 results. The company's net loss from continuing operations narrowed substantially to $2.8 million, compared to $13.7 million in the prior year period. On a per-share basis, this represented a loss of $0.25 versus $5.72 year-over-year. Cash burn from operations also improved, with the firm using $10.4 million in Q3 2024 versus $14.6 million in Q3 2023. The company ended the quarter with $35.5 million in cash, though this figure grew to approximately $110 million by early November following additional equity financing activities. A notable achievement was the 300% year-to-date increase in software and subscription bookings relative to the prior year period. The company appointed Stephen Chen as interim CEO following the retirement of previous leader Mike Snavely. Rahul Mewawalla, described as a global technology and AI leader, assumed the role of Board Chairman. Management indicated the company would focus on developing secure, localized AI frameworks for enterprise and government clients while prioritizing data protection and compliance standards. The firm also signed a term sheet to acquire controlling interest in MyCanvass, LLC, a SaaS platform entity.
